object_type: numerical Boltzmann solver interface and implementation contract for DFM-MKC cosmological perturbations
purpose: Specify the executable solver contract needed before any ACT, Planck, DESI, matter-power, weak-lensing, or likelihood run, while explicitly not supplying numerical integration results or empirical comparison.

solver_inputs.fit_status: No fit is performed in this object.

solver_equation_blocks.background_ode_block: FLRW-reduced DFM-MKC background equations inherited from DFM_MKC_FIELD_EQUATIONS_V1.
solver_equation_blocks.metric_constraint_block: Poisson, momentum, and anisotropy constraints inherited from DFM_MKC_LINEAR_PERTURBATION_SYSTEM_V1.
solver_equation_blocks.dfm_mkc_scalar_block: delta_phi and delta_theta perturbation equations inherited from DFM_MKC_LINEAR_PERTURBATION_SYSTEM_V1.
solver_equation_blocks.visible_matter_block: Visible baryon continuity and Euler equations with photon-baryon drag placeholders.
solver_equation_blocks.radiation_block: Photon continuity, Euler, and higher-moment hierarchy placeholders.
solver_equation_blocks.closure_block: Recombination, visibility, photon hierarchy truncation, neutrino hierarchy, and lensing source closure are declared as required implementation modules but not supplied here.

required_numerical_methods.time_integrator: Adaptive ODE integrator with stiffness detection or explicitly justified non-stiff regime.
required_numerical_methods.constraint_monitoring: Track Einstein constraint residuals over k and eta.
required_numerical_methods.hierarchy_truncation: Declare ell_max, closure rule, and convergence checks before use.
required_numerical_methods.interpolation: Declare interpolation scheme for transfer functions and observable projection kernels.
required_numerical_methods.implementation_status: Required numerical methods are specified as a contract; no executable solver is supplied here.

required_solver_outputs.numerical_output_status: No numerical outputs are produced in this object.

external_solver_binding_option.binding_status: No trusted external solver binding is supplied in this object.

next_admissible_step: Supply DFM_MKC_EXECUTABLE_SOLVER_IMPLEMENTATION_V1 or DFM_MKC_TRUSTED_EXTERNAL_SOLVER_BINDING_V1 before any numerical prediction-vector run.
